NPU LLC Controller 0

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x188000
Size:
0x1d4
Source:
npu_llc_rf.rdl

Description

Controls the operation of a shared 4MiB 16-way set-associative L3 cache. Cache line size is 64 bytes. Cache is composed of 4 banks. During boot, the cache memory is configured to be used as Scratchpad RAM (SPRAM, CodaCache).

Offset Identifier Name

0x004 ccutar -
0x008 - -

0x02C ccuspbr1 SPRAM base address (upper word)
